organization.name: Apple
organization.description: Apple Inc. is a global technology company shaping digital experiences through its integrated hardware, software, and services ecosystem. With Apple Wallet, Apple plays a key role in the adoption of digital wallets, supporting use cases such as payments, digital cards, car keys, and mobile driving licences (mDL). Its approach emphasizes privacy, security, and seamless user experience, contributing to the global landscape of digital identity and verifiable data.
